files.updatePlan: Add a top banner 'SHIPPED 2026-05-18 (commit 5a01f5cae) — historical design record, no longer awaiting review'. Change Status line to 'shipped'. In §14, mark resolved questions and flag the 2 NOT-implemented items (bootstrap script absent, INDEX.json aliases[] absent) so they aren't mistaken for done. No content deletion — keep as ADR-style history.

summary: Single file: UFR-022 5-phase design spec. KEEP as historical design record (feature shipped 2026-05-18, all artifacts present). UPDATE-light: header/footer still read draft/awaiting-review; 2 §14 open questions (bootstrap script, INDEX aliases[]) never built — flag as unresolved. Not redundant w/ SKILL.md (design rationale vs operational instructions).
